summary.summary: Merge of release/v0.8.0 into dev to sync the new version and include the merge commit. The pull-request descriptions state: "Syncs new version + merge commit back to `dev`." (pr:gordolio/Trio#1168, pr:nightscout/Trio#1168) and commit 02648dc31713ee7342f725da78ffd6a5d853cc33 is the merge commit for this change (commit:02648dc31713ee7342f725da78ffd6a5d853cc33).
summary.userFacingImpact: The supplied sources only show a version-sync merge back to dev and do not include detailed release notes or file-level changes, so user-visible functional changes cannot be determined from these sources alone. The PR descriptions point to external release notes (https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/releases/tag/v0.8.0) for details (pr:gordolio/Trio#1168, pr:nightscout/Trio#1168). Human review of the release notes or the diff is required to assess user-facing impact.
